Synopsis: Revises membership of Executive Commission on Ethical Standards; renames commission; requires ethics training for State employees; increases penalties for ethics violations.
Renames the Primary Care Physician and Dentist Loan Redemption Program and makes various other changes to the program.
Renames "Open Public Meetings Act" in honor of Senator Byron M. Baer. *
Renames New Jersey Merit Rating Plan and provides for changes in procedures for payment of outstanding surcharges. *
Renames Continental Airlines Arena the Continental Airlines - Brendan Byrne Arena.
Renames the "Temporary Disability Benefits Law" as the "Temporary Disability and Pregnancy Benefits Law."
Reorganizes and renames NJ Commerce, Economic Growth and Tourism Commission as NJ Commerce Commission; transfers Division of Travel and Tourism to Department of State.
Renames "Cigarette Sales Act" as "Tobacco Products Sales Act"; facilitates collection of taxes on non-face-to-face retail sales of tobacco products.
Renames the "police court of the Palisades Interstate park" as "Court of Palisades Interstate Park."
Revises membership of Executive Commission on Ethical Standards; renames commission; makes various other changes concerning ethics.
Renames Work First New Jersey program as Family Development Program and makes other revisions to program.
Renames the Primary Care Physician and Dentist Loan Redemption Program and makes various other changes to the program.
Renames "Open Public Meetings Act" in honor of Senator Byron M. Baer.
Renames "Cigarette Sales Act" as "Tobacco Products Sales Act"; facilitates collection of taxes on non-face-to-face retail sales of tobacco products.
Renames New Jersey Rating Plan and provides for changes in procedures for payment of outstanding surcharges.
Renames the "Temporary Disability Benefits Law" as the "Temporary Disability and Pregnancy Benefits Law."
Renames the "police court of the Palisades Interstate park" as "Court of Palisades Interstate Park."
Reorganizes and renames NJ Commerce, Economic Growth and Tourism Commission as NJ Commerce Commission; transfers Division of Travel and Tourism to Department of State.
